name: Gingerbread Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diet margarine or light butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, thoroughly cream margarine with sugar.
3. Stir in egg whites, molasses, and vinegar.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, cinnamon, and cloves.
5. Gradually stir dry ingredients into the margarine and sugar mixture until combined.
6. Chill dough for 3 hours or overnight. Store batter in refrigerator for up to several days.
7. Divide dough into four balls for easier handling.
8. Place each dough ball between two sheets of lightly floured wax paper and roll out to desired thickness.
9. Cut out gingerbread shapes using floured cookie cutters.
10. If desired, decorate with raisins or dried fruit.
11. Bake cookies on an ungreased baking sheet for about 8 minutes or longer until firm.
12. Test doneness by pressing dough lightly with one finger; if it springs back, it's ready.
13. Cool cookies on a rack before decorating with colorful icing, if desired.
Makes 4 dozen.
